content.json:
# 🛡️ SpyCloud Sentinel — Threat Intelligence Dashboard

![SpyCloud](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iammrherb/SPYCLOUD-SENTINEL/main/docs/images/SpyCloud-Logo-white.png)

Real-time visibility into darknet exposure, automated remediation status, and identity threat posture.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    TotalExposures = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(email),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(infected_machine_id),
    CriticalSev25 = countif(severity == 25),
    HighSev20 = countif(severity == 20),
    MedSev5 = countif(severity == 5),
    LowSev2 = countif(severity == 2),
    PlaintextPasswords = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)),
    UniqueDomains = dcount(target_domain))
content.title: Exposure Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), tostring(severity)
| render timechart)
content.title: Exposures Over Time by Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by Severity = case(severity == 25, '🔴 P1 Critical (Sev 25)', severity == 20, '🔴 P1 High (Sev 20)', severity == 5, '🟠 P3 Standard (Sev 5)', severity == 2, '⚪ P4 Low (Sev 2)', 'Other')
| render piechart)
content.title: Severity Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(email:string, ExposureCount:long, MaxSeverity:long, HasPlaintext:long, TargetDomains:long, Latest:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where isnotempty(email)
| summarize ExposureCount = count(), MaxSeverity = max(severity), HasPlaintext = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), TargetDomains = dcount(target_domain), LatestExposure = max(TimeGenerated) by email
| top 20 by MaxSeverity desc, ExposureCount desc
| project email, ExposureCount, MaxSeverity, HasPlaintext, TargetDomains, Latest = format_datetime(LatestExposure, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'))
content.title: Top 20 Most Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(password_type)
| summarize Count = count() by password_type
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart)
content.title: Password Type Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize Count = count() by target_domain
| top 15 by Count desc
| render barchart)
content.title: Top Targeted Domains

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(infected_machine_id:string, user_hostname:string, Users:long, MaxSeverity:long, Domains:long, Latest:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where severity >= 20
| where isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize Users = dcount(email), MaxSeverity = max(severity), TargetDomains = dcount(target_domain), LatestInfection = max(TimeGenerated) by infected_machine_id, user_hostname
| top 20 by MaxSeverity desc, Users desc
| project infected_machine_id, user_hostname, Users, MaxSeverity, Domains = TargetDomains, Latest = format_datetime(LatestInfection, 'yyyy-MM-dd'))
content.title: Top 20 Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity >= 20
| where isnotempty(country_code)
| summarize Devices = dcount(infected_machine_id), Users = dcount(email) by country_code
| top 20 by Devices desc
| render barchart)
content.title: Infections by Country

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(MDE_Actions:long, CA_Actions:long, HighSev_Users:long, Remediation_Pct:real)[]),
(print MDE_Actions = toscalar(union isfuzzy=true (datatable(c:long)[0]),(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | summarize c=count()) | summarize sum(c)),
  CA_Actions = toscalar(union isfuzzy=true (datatable(c:long)[0]),(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | summarize c=count()) | summarize sum(c)),
  HighSev_Users = toscalar(union isfuzzy=true (datatable(c:long)[0]),(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where severity >= 20 | summarize c=dcount(email)) | summarize sum(c)),
  Remediation_Pct = 0.0)
content.title: Remediation Dashboard

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), PlaybookName
| render timechart)
content.title: MDE Remediation Actions Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[] | where 1==0),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), PlaybookName
| render timechart)
content.title: CA Remediation Actions Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project ['Source ID'] = source_id, ['Breach Title'] = breach_title, ['Status'] = status, ['Description'] = description, ['Ingested'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')
| top 25 by Ingested desc)
content.title: Recent Breach Catalog Entries

content.json:
---

*SpyCloud Sentinel Supreme v5.2 — Dashboard auto-refreshes with time range selector above.*
